LegacyEmbed.AdvancedMenu.autoScroll.value: Load events automatically when the bottom of the list is reached

LegacyEmbed.AdvancedMenu.linkCSS.value: Add a link to a stylesheet

LegacyEmbed.App.mapCodeLabel.value: This widget shows the events on a map and filters down event list when markers are clicked.

LegacyEmbed.CalendarMenu.code.value: This widget allows you to filter the embedded agenda by range of dates.

LegacyEmbed.EmbedSelection.calendarInfo.value: Displays a days-of-the-month calendar. This code is placed alongside the main embed

LegacyEmbed.EmbedSelection.listInfo.value: The embed code that integrates the main view of your calendar.

LegacyEmbed.EmbedSelection.mapInfo.value: Displays a map. This code is placed alongside the main embed

LegacyEmbed.EmbedSelection.searchInfo.value: Displays an input to allow syntaxic searches. This code is placed alongside the main embed

LegacyEmbed.EmbedSelection.tagInfo.value: Displays a list of values. This code is placed alongside the main embed

LegacyEmbed.GeneralMenu.syncHref.value: Update the browser address bar as the user navigates the calendar

LegacyEmbed.GeneralMenu.useEventSlug.value: Use slugs as event identifiers in the address bar

LegacyEmbed.PositioningMapMenu.mapAuto.value: Update browser address bar with agenda parameters

LegacyEmbed.Presentation.create.value: Create an embed for this agenda

LegacyEmbed.Presentation.description.value: Display the agenda anywhere you like on any webpage or on Facebook, with supporting map, categories or calendar widgets.

LegacyEmbed.Presentation.details.value: Creating a view of your agenda will allow you to embed its content and use navigation widgets like a map, a calendar, categories menus... directly in the website of your choice

LegacyEmbed.Presentation.title.value: Integrate the agenda in your website

LegacyEmbed.ShareMenu.facebookAppIdSub.value: Required to share events on Facebook with links pointing on your website

LegacyEmbed.ShareMenu.siteURL.value: Use the URL of your website in share links (activate the url update option)

LegacyEmbed.TagSelectionMenu.tagMenuInfo.value: Changes you bring here update the embed code

LegacyEmbed.TagSelectionMenu.tagSelectio.value: Select the values to load in the widget

LegacyEmbed.TagSelectionMenu.useGroupVal.value: Use all values from a field

LegacyEmbed.TilesMapMenu.tilesInputLabel.value: Specify a custom tiles link to be used by the map

LegacyEmbed.TilesMapMenu.tilesInputPlace.value: Paste the tile link template here
